prestazioni: Garrett GT2260S turbocharger upgrade for the GME T4 1.3L Multiair Turbo (engine code: 384A2.000) to achieve 320 HP and 450 Nm torque with a custom ECU flash from Viezu Technologies (Stage 2+ map) and supporting fuel system upgrades including a Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part number: DFV OT-T1-02-A) with 8-position adjustable compression damping and 20-way rebound damping, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) to optimize wheel fitment and cornering dynamics

Brembo GT 6-piston front brake kit (part number: 1N3.9800.10) with 380mm two-piece floating rotors and Ferodo DS2500 high-performance brake pads, complemented by a Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake line kit for improved pedal feel and heat resistance
estetica: Novitec Alfa Romeo Tonale-specific widebody kit (part number: NOV-TON-1000) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and extended rocker panels, designed to accommodate the Ohlins suspension and Eibach spacers while maintaining OEM+ fitment

Rocket Bunny V3 rear wing (part number: PB-TON-003) in pre-preg carbon fiber with adjustable angle mounts, paired with a custom front splitter from Maxton Design (part number: MX-TON-FS-01) featuring integrated canards and a 3D-printed ABS underbody diffuser for optimized downforce

Enkei PF07 wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) in Hyper Silver finish with custom center caps featuring the Alfa Romeo Quadrifoglio emblem, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) for maximum grip and track-ready performance
